title: Vex's Transformation
description: Do you hate Vexes?, but always wanted more allays?
body:
Do you hate Vex's?, but always wanted more allay's?

Well, with Vex's Transformation all vex's will have a 20% chance to be replaced with an allay or be removed!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
